name: TOGAF ADM gate mapping — sample scaffolding

rules.controlName: Preliminary — architecture contract and principles captured
rules.description: Maps ADM preliminary phase checkpoints to explicit architecture principles and stakeholder agreement before iterative cycles.

rules.controlName: Architecture Vision — baseline vs target and gap surfaced
rules.description: ADM Architecture Vision emphasizes agreed scope statements; graph should surface baseline/current vs target deltas with traceable gap owners.
Business Architecture checkpoint: capabilities trace to enabling services/platforms when context snapshots expose those layers.

rules.controlName: Migration Planning — roadmap and dependency ordering
rules.description: Migration Planning gates require ordered transition increments; finding engines can flag contradictory sequencing hints.
Aligns TOGAF implementation governance checkpoints with persisted evidence (manifest artifacts, approvals, audits) surfaced in Operator flows.
